trails.name: Ellangowan Scenic Reserve Track
trails.description: This track gives you panoramic views of Banks Peninsula. It also has a variety of beech forest and interesting herb plants along the way.

trails.name: Ellangowan Scenic Reserve walk
trails.description: This walk gives you panoramic views of Banks Peninsula. It also has a variety of beech forest and interesting herb plants along the way.

trails.name: Ōtepatotu Scenic Reserve walk
trails.description: This loop track reaches the summit of Lavericks Peak with a 'goblin forest' on the way – trees hung with weeping moss.
